about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a backend developer with over five years in .NET (C# and VB.NET) and Microsoft SQL Server. Most of that work has been production software for banks, insurers, HR platforms, and government agencies: the systems and APIs those organisations rely on day to day. At PT Xtremax Teknologi Indonesia I build backend services and REST APIs, and before that I led a small development team through whole project cycles, from technical design to deployment. Outside .NET, I build full-stack apps with React and Next.js, and I lean on an AI agentic coding workflow with Claude, GitHub Copilot, and OpenCode to ship faster without losing track of the code. I care about code that the next person can read and change without having to guess what it does. I work comfortably with distributed teams and am open to remote/freelance roles or relocation, including with companies outside Indonesia.

bullets: Build and maintain backend features for Singapore public-sector websites running on Sitefinity and Sitecore CMS.
Develop REST APIs and connect third-party services so client sites can show live, up-to-date content.
Customise Sitefinity modules and templates to fit each client's content structure and design.
Write and tune SQL queries so pages stay responsive against large datasets.
Write unit tests and fix defects quickly to keep sites stable in production.
Work with designers, content teams, and project managers to ship features that match the brief.
Built web applications for HR, event-management, and operational systems, in C#/ASP.NET MVC and PHP/CodeIgniter.
Maintained and upgraded existing systems to keep them current with their frameworks and libraries.
Wrote unit tests and debugged production issues so releases stayed stable.
Integrated REST and SOAP APIs to connect client systems with external services.
Designed database schemas and wrote the queries each application needed.
Wrote clear technical documentation so other developers could pick up and extend the code.
Worked with internal and client teams to scope features and resolve issues as they came up.
Led the technical work on projects and kept delivery on schedule and within budget.
Broke work down into tasks and distributed them across the development team.
Worked with the project manager and product owner on plans and timelines.
Worked with the business analyst on system design.
Wrote technical specification documents from the functional specs (FSD).
Ran technical design meetings and walked the team through how each feature would be built.
Reviewed pull and merge requests in Git.
Set coding standards and made sure the team kept to them.
Deployed applications to IIS on the development and test servers (Windows Server on Azure VMs).
Wrote functional specification documents from the requirement elicitation documents (RED).
Developed, analysed, and tested software against the system design.
Investigated software defects in live systems.
Reproduced and fixed production issues.
Explained the technical approach for proposed solutions in project meetings.
Wrote deployment guide documents.
Wrote functional specification documents from the requirement elicitation documents (RED).
Developed, analysed, and tested software against the system design.
Investigated defects and fixed production issues in live systems.
Explained the technical approach for proposed solutions in project meetings.
Wrote deployment guides and kept daily task reports up to date.
Developed and maintained operational risk-management systems (ORMS) for Adira Insurance and BTPN, in VB.NET and ASP.NET Web Forms.
Wrote and optimised SQL Server stored procedures, views, and SSIS ETL jobs to process large volumes of financial data.
Built regulatory and business-intelligence reports in SSRS to meet compliance and reporting requirements.
Automated end-to-end test scenarios with Katalon, which widened test coverage and cut manual QA time.
Worked with business analysts to turn functional specs into working features.

heritagesg-website-maintenance.description: Ongoing maintenance and feature work on the HeritageSG website, built on Sitecore CMS with C# and .NET Framework MVC.

yellow-ribbon-singapore-website.description: Backend and CMS development for the Yellow Ribbon Singapore website on Sitefinity, using C# and .NET Framework MVC over SQL Server.

public-service-commission-website.description: Built and maintained backend features for the Public Service Commission website on Sitefinity, with .NET MVC and SQL Server.

agency-for-science-technology-and-resear.description: Backend development for the Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR) website, built on Sitefinity CMS in C# and .NET MVC.

defense-science-and-technology-agency.description: Backend and CMS work for the Defence Science and Technology Agency (DSTA) website on Sitefinity, in C# and .NET MVC.

unpacking-direction-ttlc.description: A PHP and CodeIgniter web application for the Unpacking Direction TTLC programme, with a MySQL backend and a jQuery and AJAX front end.

sustainability-tam-event-management.description: An event-management system (Sustainability TAM) built in C# and ASP.NET MVC, backed by SQL Server and covered with NUnit tests.

hris-job-tomori.description: An HR information system (HRIS) for JOB Tomori, built in ASP.NET MVC with REST and SOAP API integrations over SQL Server.

trainer-tdk-framework-tmmin.description: Delivered training on the Toyota Development Kit (TDK) framework at TMMIN, covering C#, ASP.NET MVC, and SQL Server.

rbbr-super-bank.description: A risk-based bank rating (RBBR) module for Super Bank, built in VB.NET and ASP.NET Web Forms with SSRS reporting on SQL Server.

oprisk-super-bank.description: An operational-risk (OPRISK) module for Super Bank, built in VB.NET and ASP.NET Web Forms with SQL Server and SSRS reports.

orms-adira-insurance.description: An operational risk-management system (ORMS) for Adira Insurance, built in VB.NET and ASP.NET Web Forms with SSIS data pipelines and SSRS reports.

orms-btpn.description: An operational risk-management system (ORMS) for BTPN, built in VB.NET and ASP.NET Web Forms with SQL Server, SSIS, and SSRS.

nawa-point-web-application.description: A web application (Nawa Point) built in C# and ASP.NET MVC with SQL Server, developed during my .NET training at Coding.ID.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm open to new roles and freelance work, including remote positions with teams abroad. Whether you have a project in mind or just want to talk shop about .NET or AI, drop me a message.
